nasb.text: Now it came about when Hushai the Archite, David’s friend, came to Absalom, that Hushai said to Absalom, “Long live the king! Long live the king!”

esv.text: And when Hushai the Archite, David’s friend, came to Absalom, Hushai said to Absalom, “Long live the king! Long live the king!”

cnv.text: 大衛的朋友亞基人戶篩去見押沙龍，對他說：“願王萬歲！願王萬歲！”

ccb.text: 大卫的朋友亚基人户筛去见押沙龙，对他说：“愿王万岁！愿王万岁！”
